bug_report.summary: Pilcrow/whitespace marker appears inside YAML frontmatter/code-like block when whitespace highlighting is enabled
steps_to_reproduce: Open a Markdown file that contains a YAML frontmatter block (or other code-like block).
Open Preferences → Editor and enable “Highlight whitespace” (pilcrows/whitespace markers).
Return to the editor and look at the YAML/frontmatter block area.
expected_behaviors: Whitespace line-ending markers (¶) should not be drawn for code-related content (including YAML frontmatter/code blocks), per change intent.
actual_behaviors: A pilcrow/whitespace marker is rendered within the YAML/frontmatter (code-like) block area (visible change in the frontmatter region).

bug_report.summary: Duplicate/thicker green heading indicator bar next to “# Helpful Links” in lower-right pane
steps_to_reproduce: Launch Zettlr and open the same split-view layout shown (tutorial/workspace with the “Helpful Links” document visible in the lower-right pane).
Look at the heading line “# Helpful Links” in the lower-right pane.
expected_behaviors: Heading decoration/indicator (green vertical bar next to the heading) renders as a single, consistent-width bar (as before the change).
actual_behaviors: The green vertical indicator next to “# Helpful Links” appears thicker/duplicated (looks like two adjacent green bars) compared to the before-change rendering.

bug_report.summary: Upper-right pane shows a stray/changed vertical bar (scrollbar/divider rendering artifact) after the change
steps_to_reproduce: Open Zettlr and reach the main interface with the Split View layout visible (as in the screenshot).
Look at the upper-right pane near the right edge around the mid-height region (approx. x=895–905, y=538–584).
expected_behaviors: No unexpected vertical line/bar should appear in the content area; scrollbar/divider rendering should be consistent and stable.
actual_behaviors: A narrow vertical bar/line region renders differently (appears/changes) in the upper-right pane near the right edge (bbox [895,538,905,584]), indicating a potential rendering artifact or scrollbar/divider glitch.
